context: Tests whether the agent correctly extracts design tokens from a Tailwind v4 project, fills all 12 sections, generates both output files, and prints a step 8 confirmation block.

checklist.name: Token discovery
checklist.description: Agent ran grep for CSS custom properties (--) in src/app.css or equivalent

checklist.name: Tailwind config check
checklist.description: Agent checked for tailwind.config.* file (not found is an acceptable result)

checklist.name: Component inspection
checklist.description: Agent read at least 2 component or page files before generating output

checklist.name: No placeholders
checklist.description: No {TOKEN_*} or {PROJECT_NAME} placeholders remain in the generated design-reference.md

checklist.name: Accurate colour tokens
checklist.description: All 4 colour tokens from @theme appear verbatim with their actual hex values — no invented colours

checklist.name: Dark mode TBD
checklist.description: Dark mode section contains 'TBD — not yet defined' (no dark mode was present in codebase)

checklist.name: All 12 sections present
checklist.description: All 12 sections are present in design-reference.md even if some contain only TBD markers

checklist.name: Companion SKILL.md location
checklist.description: Companion SKILL.md was generated under .agents/skills/ (not under docs/)

checklist.name: Companion SKILL.md specificity
checklist.description: Companion SKILL.md frontmatter description names the specific project, not a generic tool description

checklist.name: Confirmation block printed
checklist.description: Step 8 confirmation block was printed listing populated sections with token counts

checklist.name: TBD items listed
checklist.description: Step 8 confirmation block explicitly lists TBD items (at minimum: dark mode)

checklist.name: Authoritative token file named
checklist.description: Reference sheet names src/app.css (or equivalent) as the authoritative token file

checklist.name: No assumed breakpoints
checklist.description: Agent did not assume Tailwind breakpoints from memory — checked config or CSS

checklist.name: Actual component classNames
checklist.description: Component pattern in §9 uses actual className strings from the codebase, not invented JSX

checklist.name: Scratchpad used
checklist.description: Agent populated or referenced skill-output.yaml before generating markdown (or equivalent scratchpad step)

checklist.name: Schema validation referenced
checklist.description: Agent validated or referenced schema validation before generating markdown
